column1: #mapping_set_description: LLM-generated mappings from the FIX Protocol LinkML schema to the ISO/IEC 27001 ISMS LinkML schema. Coverage is intentionally minimal because the schemas have very weak semantic overlap; mappings are speculative relatedMatch entries except for the Organization correspondence.

column8: Business reject-reason codes loosely map to audit-finding classification.
An Extension Pack is documented change information per ISO 27001 Clause 7.5.
Both denote an Organization entity in their respective contexts.
